'''ân-ng-p''' ('''kanangap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:polarise|polarise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:polarise|polarise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-ng-p
|-
! Lemma
| kanangap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinangap|thinangap]] || [[word:jinangap|jinangap]] || [[word:shinangap|shinangap]] || [[word:kinangap|kinangap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunangap|thuthunangap]] || [[word:jujunangap|jujunangap]] || [[word:shushunangap|shushunangap]] || [[word:kukunangap|kukunangap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunangap|thunangap]] || [[word:junangap|junangap]] || [[word:shunangap|shunangap]] || [[word:kunangap|kunangap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunangap|thunangap]] || [[word:junangap|junangap]] || [[word:shunangap|shunangap]] || [[word:kunangap|kunangap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenangap|thenangap]] || [[word:jenangap|jenangap]] || [[word:shenangap|shenangap]] || [[word:kenangap|kenangap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonangap|thothonangap]] || [[word:jojonangap|jojonangap]] || [[word:shoshonangap|shoshonangap]] || [[word:kokonangap|kokonangap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonangap|thonangap]] || [[word:jonangap|jonangap]] || [[word:shonangap|shonangap]] || [[word:konangap|konangap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonangap|thonangap]] || [[word:jonangap|jonangap]] || [[word:shonangap|shonangap]] || [[word:konangap|konangap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnangap|thĂŠnangap]] || [[word:jĂŠnangap|jĂŠnangap]] || [[word:shĂŠnangap|shĂŠnangap]] || [[word:kĂŠnangap|kĂŠnangap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanangap|thathanangap]] || [[word:jajanangap|jajanangap]] || [[word:shashanangap|shashanangap]] || [[word:kakanangap|kakanangap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanangap|thanangap]] || [[word:janangap|janangap]] || [[word:shanangap|shanangap]] || [[word:kanangap|kanangap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanangap|thanangap]] || [[word:janangap|janangap]] || [[word:shanangap|shanangap]] || [[word:kanangap|kanangap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanangap|shanangap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanangap|goshanangap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanangap|gokishanangap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanangapnĂŒ|shanangapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanangapnknĂŒ|goshanangapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangapnĂŒ|gokishanangapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanangapshĂ«|shanangapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanangapnkshĂ«|goshanangapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanangapshĂ«|gokishanangapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangapro|shanangapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangapnkro|goshanangapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangapro|gokishanangapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangapmu|shanangapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangapnkmu|goshanangapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangapmu|gokishanangapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanangapsher|shanangapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanangapnksher|goshanangapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanangapsher|gokishanangapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanangapng|shanangapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanangapnkng|goshanangapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanangapng|gokishanangapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanangapya|shanangapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanangapnkya|goshanangapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanangapya|gokishanangapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanangapyam|shanangapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanangapnkyam|goshanangapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanangapyam|gokishanangapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanangapnĂŒshĂ«|shanangapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanangapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanangapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanangapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanangapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangapnĂŒro|shanangapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangapnknĂŒro|goshanangapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangapnĂŒro|gokishanangapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangapnĂŒmu|shanangapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangapnknĂŒmu|goshanangapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangapnĂŒmu|gokishanangapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanangapshĂ«nĂŒ|shanangapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanangapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanangapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanangapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangapshĂ«ro|shanangapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangapnkshĂ«ro|goshanangapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangapshĂ«ro|gokishanangapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangapshĂ«mu|shanangapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangapnkshĂ«mu|goshanangapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangapshĂ«mu|gokishanangapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanangapronĂŒ|shanangapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanangapnkronĂŒ|goshanangapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangapronĂŒ|gokishanangapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanangaproshĂ«|shanangaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanangapnkroshĂ«|goshanangapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanangaproshĂ«|gokishanangaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangapromu|shanangapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangapnkromu|goshanangapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangapromu|gokishanangapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanangapmunĂŒ|shanangapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanangapnkmunĂŒ|goshanangapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangapmunĂŒ|gokishanangapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanangapmushĂ«|shanangapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanangapnkmushĂ«|goshanangapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanangapmushĂ«|gokishanangapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangapmuro|shanangapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangapnkmuro|goshanangapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangapmuro|gokishanangapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
